summary: Frontend testing of: (1) FloatingStyleButton removal from FloatingToolbar in /daily-sessions map - verified 4 buttons only (edit/copy/smooth/remove). (2) style-dropdown-btn removal from MapToolbar. (3) ZoneCategoryManager border section in /haram-map?tab=settings categories dialog - verified all 5 new data-testids (cat-stroke-color, cat-stroke-solid, cat-stroke-dashed, cat-stroke-dotted, cat-stroke-dash-dot). All 6 test points PASSED.

floating_toolbar_style_btn_removed.note: Clicked zone at map coords, floating toolbar appeared with exactly 4 buttons

category_dialog_border_section.note: Both add and edit dialogs show the الإطار (Border) section with color picker, width/opacity sliders, and 4 style buttons

js_errors.note: 2 x 404 resource-load errors (pre-existing, not related to feature), 2 x Radix DialogContent aria-describedby warnings (minor accessibility)

critical_code_review_comments: FloatingToolbar in MapCanvas.jsx: correctly has 4 buttons only (edit/copy/smooth/remove). onClick stopPropagation still present from iteration_44 fix.
MapToolbar.jsx: no style-related dropdown - clean toolbar with edit mode, shapes, zones, zoom, undo/redo.

ZoneCategoryManager.jsx: Border section (الإطار) at line 488-536 has all required elements: cat-stroke-color color input, Slider for width, Slider for opacity, 4 style buttons with correct data-testids.
Minor: Radix DialogContent missing aria-describedby attribute - accessibility warning only, not functional issue.
seed_data_creation: Used existing 15 zone categories and جولة الأربعاء 4 مارس 2026 session
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 feature areas verified: (1) FloatingToolbar has exactly 4 buttons (no float-style-btn). (2) MapToolbar has no style-dropdown-btn. (3) Category dialog at /haram-map?tab=settings → الفئات tab has border section with cat-stroke-color, cat-stroke-solid, cat-stroke-dashed, cat-stroke-dotted, cat-stroke-dash-dot. ZonePreview polygon in dialog shows stroke style live. 15 categories loaded correctly.
